programme.desc: Join Jack on a Wild Countdown safari to South Africa, Peru, Kenya, Borneo, and Namibia with Jack’s favorite guides leading the way to see cheetahs, lions, rhinos, pink dolphins, and much more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets creatures armed with superb scales, like Nile Crocodiles, Galapagos Tortoises, Thorny Devils, an African Rock Python, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: What could be better than getting up-close animal encounters with wildlife from Africa, Asia, and North America? Doing it all in one place, right here in the ole' US of A!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he braves the waters of Botswana's Okavango Delta! The world's largest inland delta provides a beautiful home to thriving wildlife like Crocs, Hippos, and Elephants.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: You're Endangered, Baby
programme.desc: What does it take to save a species from extinction? Patience, education and lots of babies! Today, Jungle Jack is counting down six endangered species surviving against all odds -- one baby at a time.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In southern Brazil, Jack and Kathaleen boat up a raging river to Iguassu Falls, the world's largest. At the base of the falls, dad and daughter marvel at the unusual nesting site for thousands of Swifts.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Feeding Frenzy
programme.desc: Today’s countdown is filled with delicious and nutritious adventures. From carnivores like jackals, lions, and sharks to our vegetarian friends, the elephants, Jungle Jack is gearing up for a Feeding Frenzy!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jack to the Future
programme.desc: Today, it’s a two-for-one special, as Jack travels to each location TWICE! Cheetahs, rhinos, manatees, kangaroos and more! Join Jack for time-traveling tour through natural history.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack, Suzi, and Kathaleen as they immerse themselves with Phinda's rangers who are protecting the reserve's precious population of rhinos and lions!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Get a glimpse of life on the Hanna's farm. Then he and Sue meet a couple that have dedicated their lives to providing a home for disabled dogs, cats, and horses. Jack heads to the eastern front of the Rocky Mountains for an old-fashioned cattle drive!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack trades his safari suit for a wet suit as he dives in with bottle-nosed dolphins! Jack and Sue, get more than they bargained for as they go along for the ride with dolphins on their daily outing into the open ocean.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Rebounding
programme.desc: Meet six amazing animals rallying from the brink of extinction. Bald eagles, American alligators, Florida manatees, Peregrine falcons and more.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack and his family as they immerse themselves into the elephant population at Zimbabwe's Hwange National Park. The Hanna's hide-out underground in a unique bunker at one of Hwange's watering holes.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack takes his grandson on an epic Serengeti safari. They witness Cheetahs and Lions on the savannah, Wildebeest, and Zebra starting their annual migration, and visit a local Maasai school.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack gets a special behind-the-scenes look at a retirement home for chimpanzees where caregivers have rescued over 250 chimps that now live in large family groups on specially designed islands in Florida.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack and his daughter Kathleen travel to northern Canada for encounters with Beluga whales and Polar bears. At Churchill, the Hannas find Hudson Bay much to their liking, but nothing tops the small town's hottest summer pastime.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he reveals how to tell the difference between some commonly confused creatures, like Cheetahs and Leopards, Crocs and Gators, Penguins and Puffins, Turtles and Tortoises and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Adaptations
programme.desc: From the Arctic to the desert, animals have found a way to survive and thrive in every eco-system on the planet. Join Jack as he’s counting down ten amazing animal adaptations.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack goes behind the scenes of the International Anti-Poaching Foundation to see how they are bringing paramilitary techniques to the front lines of conservation in a fight to protect Africa's rhinos.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Stinkiest Stinkers
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he sniffs out the smelliest animals on the planet! Sloths, Tasmanian devils, sperm whales, binturongs, hyenas, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: My Better Half
programme.desc: Jack’s wife Suzi – she’s a loving mother, a passionate conservationist, and a fearless adventurer. Come along for encounters with dolphins, elephants, cheetahs and poison dart frogs, just to name a few.

programme.title: Jamie & Jimmy's Food Fight Club
programme.desc: Susan Sarandon is in New Orleans as Jamie and Jimmy join her to cook up seafood gumbo, the official state cuisine of Louisiana.

programme.title: Jamie & Jimmy's Food Fight Club
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver and Jimmy Doherty are opening a little pop-up cafe at the end of Southend pier; Jamie and Jimmy put British cheeses nose-to-nose with their French rivals.

programme.title: Jamie & Jimmy's Food Fight Club
programme.desc: German vs. British sausages.

programme.title: Jamie & Jimmy's Food Fight Club
programme.desc: Jonathan Ross joins Jimmy and Jamie as they compete against Italian desserts.

programme.title: Jamie's Quick & Easy Food
programme.desc: Ginger beef and pak choi; crispy squid and smashed avocado; pork and mash gratin; almond, orange and polenta cake.

programme.title: Jamie's Quick & Easy Food
programme.desc: Pork burger; sticky mango prawns; easy rustic gnocchi; frozen banoffee cheesecake.

programme.title: Jamie's Quick & Easy Food
programme.desc: Jamie cooks up his tikka chicken, a very quick roast; making a vibrant carrot and grain salad and speedy crab spaghetti; for dessert, Jamie makes chocolate orange shortbread.

programme.title: Jamie's Quick & Easy Food
programme.desc: Stress-free sausage carbonara; spicy one-pot Thai red chicken soup; scrambled egg omelette; steamed puddings with sticky marmalade glaze.

programme.title: Jamie's Quick & Easy Food
programme.desc: Flaky pastry pesto chicken; spicy nduja vongole; surf and turf pasta; sausage bake; watermelon granita.

programme.title: Jamie's Quick & Easy Food
programme.desc: Sticky kickin' chicken wings; sirloin with aubergines; creamy garlic mushroom pasta; rum 'n' raisin ice cream.

programme.title: Jamie at Home
programme.desc: Potato salad; Spanish omelette and roast chicken tray bake with tomatoes and potatoes.

programme.title: Jamie at Home
programme.desc: Fresh cheese and onion salad; English onion and leek soup with cheddar cheese.

programme.title: Jamie at Home
programme.desc: Curried fritters with a simple batter; hearty cannelloni; ham and spring greens with mustard and celery leaves.

programme.title: Jamie at Home
programme.desc: Jamie cooks up everything from shellfish to lamb, chicken, ribs and onions on the barbecue.

programme.title: Jamie at Home
programme.desc: Spicy pork goulash; roasted peppers stuffed with chili, tomatoes and fresh herbs.

programme.title: Jamie at Home
programme.desc: Jamie explores his garden for winter vegetables to use for seasonal dishes.

programme.title: Jamie at Home
programme.desc: Jamie applies Asian, European and British cooking principles to get the best out of each bird in an attempt to show viewers how versatile game birds are.

programme.title: Jamie at Home
programme.desc: Egg tagliatelle; omelet salad with bresaola; meringue with hot pears and chocolate sauce.

programme.title: Jamie at Home
programme.desc: Jamie's version of a bagna cauda; herb omelet salad; Japanese-style tuna sashimi; sprouting herb salad.

programme.title: Jamie at Home
programme.desc: Jamie uses three different ways of cooking and dressing asparagus.

programme.title: Jamie's 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: This time the meal is spiced chicken, bacon, asparagus and spinach lentils; falafel wraps, grilled veg and salsa.

programme.title: Jamie's 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie cooks grilled tuna, "kinda" Niçoise salad, Thai chicken laksa, and mildly-spiced noodle squash broth.

programme.title: Jamie's 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: On the menu are quick lamb tagine, pan-fried aubergine and cumin crunch; crispy polenta chicken caesar salad.

programme.title: Jamie's 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Fettuccini; smoked trout; asparagus and peas; black bean beef burgers.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: In this episode Chef Jamie Oliver's menu includes pork Marsala, porcini rice, and spring greens. Plus, koh samui salad, chili tofu, and Thai noodles.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: A band of outlaws masquerading as Indians wages a campaign of terror on the homesteaders.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Citizens of Mesa are divided by old loyalties.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: A monogrammed glove and a child's wooden rifle are the clues found near a dead man.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Lone Ranger and Tonto help a 22-year-old cowboy who assumes the responsibilities of town sheriff.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: A convicted gunman impersonates the Lone Ranger in his hateful attempt to get revenge.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Lone Ranger and Tonto confront a gang of hoods who kill an elderly marshall in a reign of terror.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Lone Ranger and Tonto search for the thieves who stole a golden, jeweled cross from two priests.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Lone Ranger and Tonto help an elderly American Indian chief determine his successor.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Ranger impersonates two men to help a Mexican patriot cross the border.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Lone Ranger and Tonto search for $10,000 in missing gold.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: A teacher helps the Lone Ranger and Tonto stop the Cheyenne from destroying a small Western town.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Residents of a mining town kidnap a Chinese laundryman's mail-order bride.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Lone Ranger and Tonto intervene when a band of marauders threaten to kill a marshal.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Two brothers who fought for the South during the Civil War carry their grudge against a Yankee into the West.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The McKeever gang attacks a stagecoach miles from civilization.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: A lynch mob searches for the Lone Ranger and Tonto when they defend an ex-convict in a prejudiced town.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Lone Ranger and Tonto search mining camps at Christmastime for a man needed by his family.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Lone Ranger and Tonto enter an area used for tribal ceremonies to investigate missing cattle.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Lone Ranger and Tonto track a $1 million gold shipment to a trio of bandits.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Lone Ranger intervenes when an outlaw poses as a respectable citizen and takes over the town.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Lone Ranger and Tonto try to mediate between a peaceful American Indian chief and a gang of prejudice cowboys.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: A boy's love for his dog provides a clue for the Lone Ranger and Tonto as they search for the boy's missing father.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Lone Ranger and Tonto restore justice and happiness in a farmer's life.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: A reformed outlaw becomes concerned when financial problems prevent him from adequately caring for his sick wife.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Lone Ranger and Tonto set a trap for outlaws posing as members of the cavalry.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Problems arise when a leader convinces his men to take the law into their own hands.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Lone Ranger and Tonto join forces with a retired lawman to bring in a pair of outlaws.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The son of a prominent rancher is shot in the back while tracking poachers.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Lone Ranger poses as a deaf Mexican to infiltrate a band of outlaws planning to rob a gold refinery.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A swinging bachelor (Dack Rambo) gets the shock of his life when the phony story he tells his gorgeous girlfriend (Barbi Benton) turns out to be true.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A college professor (Dick Martin) turns the Love Boat into a laboratory to test the romantic responses of his lovely female student (Char Fontane).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A tantalizing entertainer (Charo) receives some unwanted advice on love from members of the crew, who don't approve of her marriage plans.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In a special two-hour presentation, a singer (Donny Osmond) trying to break into show business finds out unexpectedly that his hillbilly family has decided to take the cruise.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Doc (Bernie Kopell) comes down with a bad case of heartache when the beautiful girl (Misty Rowe) he wants to be alone with boards ship with her ever-present sister (Vicki Lawrence).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A brilliant plain-Jane (Shelley Hack) becomes a fetching glamour gal with the help of Julie (Lauren Tewes), and falls in love with a man (Kevin Tighe) who has some mistaken ideas about her.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaac (Ted Lange) finds himself in a precarious position when he meets a beautiful former school chum (Bernadette Stanis) and her macho husband (Clifton Davis).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Romance and comic intrigue reign on the high seas as 25 engaged couples board the Pacific Princess to compete in a "Marriage-A-Thon Cruise." (Part 1)

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Darren McGavin, as dynamic promoter Larry Evans, recruits the services of "The Love Boat" to take the brides-and-grooms-to-be, who are competing for a house, a car, and $50,000 in cash, on a cruise that will wind up in a mass wedding in Acapulco. (Part 2)

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The Love Boat sails on a fantastic voyage to the most exciting ports in the Caribbean with a famed mystery writer (Pernell Roberts) who is willing to pay $100,000 to one of his hand-picked guests to solve the mystery of his missing nephew.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Julie is accused by a woman (Lani O'Grady) of stealing her fiance (Bart Braverman).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaac causes comedic chaos when he convinces the crew to bolster his stagestruck aunt's (Isabel Sanford) ego, which turns her into an outrageous prima donna.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Capt. Stubing gets trapped in a love triangle by his old girlfriend (Sue Ann Langdon), now married to the ship's former captain (Mont model (Pamela Sue Martin) attempts to insure her privacy

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The First Lady of the Silent Screen, Lillian Gish, guest stars as Isaac's former English teacher, whom he tries to avoid.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Killers often attempt to deflect attention away from their crimes by hiding the remains of their victims. Bodies may lay hidden for years before they are discovered.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a “black box.”

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The show examines cases of poison and deadly chemistry and shows how forensic experts are solving mysterious deaths today and from the past.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: New Forensic Techniques used to Solve Old Cases: Advancement in science and technology are encouraging people to revisit the past in hopes of answering questions that have remained unanswered, and solving crimes that seemed unsolvable.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A victim usually never foresees danger when the perpetrator turns out to be a friend or a lover. Science and microscopic evidence can unmask these killers and find justice for those who are Loved To Death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder, at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their undoing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Rev and Justine decide that they are finally ready to move forward with adopting a baby. While Justine worries about the details of the adoption, Jojo applies to college and is determined to gain acceptance.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: It's summertime at the Simmons House. Rev has just purchased a BMW for Jojo's graduation. Diggy and Russy remind Run that they have made the honor roll at school and wonder if they will get a gift too.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Believing Diggy's fly wardrobe may have something to do with girls being interested in him, Russy raids Diggy's closet. Hearing the boys argue over clothes, Justine decides to get Russy some clothes of his own.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Rev and Justine are both fed up with the boys' rude behavior. Justine decides to bring in a supernanny type person to teach the family the basics in social etiquette.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: When Rev learns that Diggy's play date is actually with two girls he believes that Diggy must have a crush on one of them. He's hoping it's Ja Rule's daughter because they must be rich.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Rev receives guest passes to the Mohegan Sun in Connecticut. Justine doesn't want to go. Rev is proud of Jojo's recent recordings with Blackout and wants to reward him as a fellow rapper.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Since Rev can't remember the last time Diggy and Russy had a sleepover, he requests that they invite their friends over for an unforgettable sleepover that Rev dubs "Camp Rev.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: While putting together her latest insert of Angela's Rundown, Angela discovers she has way too much content to fit into one sixteen-page insert. She and her crew at work discuss a full magazine.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: When Rev hears that his good friend Kid Rock is coming into town he invites him to stay at the house. Russy hopes that Kid will teach him how to play his guitar.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Justine is babysitting her sister Michelle's eleven-month-old baby, Ameera, for two nights. The boys look forward to helping their mom babysit as long as they don't have to change diapers.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: With their tracks finally mixed and mastered JoJo, Zach and Reggie, aka "Blackout," are ready to hit the streets and find a record deal.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: To keep occupied while going to an engineer tech school in the city, JoJo begins an internship at Phat Farm to learn the family business.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Justine's Brown Sugar jewelry line is up and running. And better yet, the Home Shopping Network is interested in working with her. So it's off to sunny Tampa to put Justine's jewelry on air.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Every family has its pecking order and being the youngest sure has its drawbacks: like getting picked on, which makes Russy the target of his brothers and sisters annoyance.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: It's time for JoJo and his group, Blackout, to hit the studio and begin recording tracks for their record. However, JoJo, Zach and Reggie are discouraged by the list of producers Latchkey Recordings has available to them.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Rev and Justine return from visiting their adopted baby they'll soon be able to call their own. They get the family excited with the news that they will have a new sister living in the house in a few days.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Season Five kicks off when Rev Run home for a short visit in between gigs of his concert tour with good pal, Kid Rock.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: The episode begins with Rev Run on stage in what is his final performance of his tour with Kid Rock. Rev returns home and his hopes of getting his diet back on track are thwarted by Russy's new cooking hobby.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: With the final mix of their debut album just around the corner, Team Blackout takes the next step in their pursuit of ultimate rap dominance: self-promotion.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Making the Honor Roll has been something Rev and Justine have come to expect from Diggy and Russy over the years. So when their latest report cards show them not making it, Rev confronts the boys about it.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: A trip to the orthodontist for Diggy and Russy brings the family some surprising news: That Russy will be getting his braces off before Diggy, who will have to wait another two months.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: With their Spring Break on the horizon, Diggy and Russy try to convince Rev and Justine to take them on a trip. Rev decides that the family should take the vacation package that he won in a Rush Philanthropic charity auction.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: With their first book written together, "Take Back Your Family," now complete, Rev and Jus begin the process of recording the book on tape version.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Team Blackout's media blitz continues as they hold a radio interview in support of their first live performance. But when the band finds out they're being assigned a choreographer for the gig they are resistant.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Angela's new relationship with pro skateboarder, Terry Kennedy, better known as T.K., starts to rub Vanessa the wrong way when Angela no longer has time for her.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: When Russy decides he wants to be a magician, Rev is concerned he might be taking on one too many hobbies. With JoJo's help, the Great Russini is a BIG hit!

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Rev forgets to tell Uncle Russell that JoJo will miss work for a family vacation. Angela and Vanessa try to help cousin Jessica meet a guy. Russy is afraid to go surfing after he loses his ancient shark tooth necklace.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Russell Simmons stops by the Harris home he and Domani hit it off. With Niq Niq getting ready to leave the nest Tameka is having a hard time letting go and arranges a day for their friends to spend together to give them life advice. Presented by VH1.

programme.desc: When Angela decides that she needs a new dog as a fashion accessory Rev puts his foot down.

programme.desc: Drita does a glamorous photoshoot for Lee, Renee has a new business idea, and when the four women gather for a dinner party, their attempts at conflict resolution go disastrously awry.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: I'm With Cupid
programme.desc: Chris and Adrianne have a heart-to-heart, where Chris questions Adrianne's motives and it seems their relationship is doomed even before it begins.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: The Kids Are All Wrong
programme.desc: Verne faces the fact that he shouldn't drink, scooter and pee. Then, the cast confronts a pack of hyperactive rug rats who threaten to burn the mansion to the ground.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Dwarves, Horses & Bears, Oh My!
programme.desc: The cast heads into the wilderness, where they learn about horses, branding calves, and pooping in the woods.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Three Crushes
programme.desc: The cast returns from camping and discovers the mansion has been turned into a spa – albeit one run by a man with a questionable approach to issues of personal space.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Celebrity Pitch Fest
programme.desc: Adrianne continues to lust after a somewhat reserved Chris.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: I'm With Cupid
programme.desc: Chris and Adrianne have a heart-to-heart, where Chris questions Adrianne's motives and it seems their relationship is doomed even before it begins.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Seven Celebrities of Death - Part 1
programme.desc: The cast discovers that they've got 24 hours to prepare for shooting a Kung Fu epic entitled SEVEN CELEBRITIES OF DEATH.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Seven Celebrities of Death - Part 2
programme.desc: At the movie set, Jane struggles to bring her vision to the silver screen, confronting slow-moving actors, technical problems and a mini-mutiny where Jane learns the harsh reality imposed by the clock.

programme.title: The Surreal Life
programme.desc: After an afternoon trip to the racetrack, where Chyna Doll experiences her own version of Pretty Woman with Marcus, the cast returns to the house and discovers that they've walked into the set of DIRTY LAUNDRY.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Get Out
programme.desc: The last day in the house has arrived. Friendships have been made and tested.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Lost Footage
programme.desc: Surreal Life 4 housemates (and real life couple) Christopher Knight and Adrianne Curry host this special that aims to answer the top 5 burning questions about the season.

programme.title: K.Michelle: My Life
programme.desc: K's dream house turns into a nightmare, as old friends become new roommates. K jets off to LA to perform on the Arsenio Hall Show. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: K.Michelle: My Life
programme.desc: K gets the best birthday gifts ever: a visit from her family and a party that's turned up. But things get complicated when new tensions arise with old friend Tracie. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: K.Michelle: My Life
programme.desc: K's sophomore album is dropping but so is her stomach, so it's time for a little nip/tuck. K has an encounter with a handsome stranger at her album listening party. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: K.Michelle: My Life
programme.desc: K sings at Jonathan's flash mob marriage proposal to his boyfriend Brian. But K wonders if she's ready to commit to the new man in her life. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: K.Michelle: My Life
programme.desc: A business trip to LA with K's friend's turns left. K must confront her issues with her baby daddy. K has to make an important life decision. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: K.Michelle: My Life
programme.desc: K. Michelle is back and living in LA - with a new song in her heart and an old love on her mind. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Evelyn draws the line with Susie over unchecked gossip about a hot weekend in Vegas. Also, Shaunie's attempt to bring Kenny Anderson's ex, Tami, into the circle is met with skepticism. The episode ends with a shocking surprise. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Fallout over Suzie and Evelyn's argument has Suzie on the run to an unexpected source….GLORIA! Also, Tami reintroduces her daughters to father Kenny Anderson after many years apart. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Shaunie and the ladies launch a surprise ambush on Gloria to find out why her wedding was called off. Jen and Eric finally have "the talk" that will alter the course of their relationship forever. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: When Evelyn and Jen find themselves left off the guest list of a posh fundraiser thrown by circle outsider Ashley Walker, they decide to crash the event. Tempers flare when Tami and Jen get into it over an innocuous remark. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Origins of WOW

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Allstar Cheer and WOW Superhero Ariel Sky debuts on WOW Tonight! Plus Americana has promised that the Heavy Metal Sisters will not go unpunished for breaking Jessie Jones' leg. Watch her get her shot at revenge.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The night kicks off with two monsters taking on twin titans. Gigi Gianni enters the world of singles competition against the natural born striker, Kandi Krush! Plus, The World's Greatest Attorney Sophia Lopez has brought Tormenta back to WOW!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Power versus Speed kicks off WOW as Reina Del Rey and Wrecking Ball take on Chantilly Chella and Foxxy Fierce in Tag Team action. Then, newcomer Crystal Waters who is one half of the freshest tag team in WOW: Spring Break 24/7 tries her hand at singles.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The WOW main event promises to be a slobber knocker as the indomitable Kandi Krush challenges the WOW World Champion Penelope Pink of the Fabulous Four! Will Krush land a knockout?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's an episode of all tag team matches!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Main Event is a 3-person match up with the might of the Island Dynasty, Tiki Chamorro, and Tonga Twins, Kona and Kaoz wrestling the Monsters of Madness, Chainsaw, Holidead and Voodoo.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In the Main Event, the WOW World Champion Penelope Pink joins her Fabulous Four teammate Vickie Lynn McCoy to face the ferocious duo of Kandi Krush and Princess Aussie in tag team action. Can the underdogs get the upset against the Fabulous Two?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In tonight's main event, can spirit overcome dominance when Coach's team of Ariel Sky and Randi Rah Rah challenge Miami's Sweet Heat, The Carlson Twins for the WOW Tag Team Championships!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After weeks of domination, two tag teams battle for the #1 contender's spot for the WOW Tag Team Championships.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Chantilly Chella attempts to dropkick her way through WOW's scariest monster, Chainsaw. GiGi Gianni and Tiki Chamorro have been impressive in their WOW rookie years, but only one can move up the ladder.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Foxxy Fierce looks to skate her way to victory against the leaping Robbie Rocket. Then, we'll see the Luchadora superstar, Tormenta, take on WOW's youngest Superhero, Jennifer Florez. Can the small but fast Gen Z star out-wrestle the experienced Tormenta?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight's hour of power kicks off with 3 on 3 action. Fury will be teaming up with her mortal enemies—Siren the Voodoo Doll and Holidead to face Americana and Spring Break 24/7, Sandy Shore and Crystal Waters? This one should be a tidal wave of action!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Luchadora, Tormenta and Rave Queen, Chantilly battle in the famed purple ring. Former tag team champions, Coach Campanelli and Randi Rah Rah try to turn around their rotten luck. A:nd new tag team sensation, Las Bandidas will attempt to take it all.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A bounty hunter is not a hero in his own hometown, as Josh learns when he honors a dying friend's request to return his body to Cameron and the townspeople rush to judgment, believing Josh killed him for the reward money.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is approached by the wife of a wanted man eager to turn himself in peacefully, provided Josh splits the bounty with his wife.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A man with unwavering faith in a legend about lost treasure hires Josh to lead his family on an expedition into the desert to locate the cache of Spanish gold.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When a young runaway is framed for killing a Pinkerton agent, Randall turns detective to uncover the real killer.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is requested to meet a famous singer at the opera house in Denver who has a job for him.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh comes to the aid of his old friend Jesse, who is being strong-armed into selling the Outrider Hotel and Saloon owned by his beautiful girlfriend.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A decidedly different and dangerous assignment awaits Josh when he agrees to go into the Apache camp and compete in their contests to win the hand of a woman.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Pursuing killer Joe Collins into the Superstition Mountains, Josh is followed by a man who believes Collins could be his long-lost son.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A blindly obedient religious cult cast lots and it falls upon a young woman to act as its angel of vengeance.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh receives a letter from a girl at the St.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A concerned father hires Josh to retrieve his son, a passionate young ideologue whose gift for rousing rhetoric is being used by plunderers to recruit freedom fighters.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh's big talk after a dog is shot lands him in big trouble when his browbeating the locals in the saloon about ending the decades-long Carter-Blake feud.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: To track down the cheating tinhorn gambler Johnny Deuce and recover his money, Randall befriends the card sharp's protégé, a 12-year-old orphan boy and card cheat, nicknamed The Montana Kid.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh embarks on a mission of mercy when he pleads with the parents of a boy with appendicitis to let the doctor operate.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh reluctantly accepts an offbeat assignment: finding a beautiful bride for his bashful buddy Charlie, the homeliest and loneliest man in the West.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The government employs Randall to portray an escaped prisoner in order to trick his cellmate into leading authorities to the $50,000 he stole and stashed away in a secret location.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall finds his prey in the hands of a lynch mob wiping out his bounty.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Who needs enemies with friends like the residents of Rogue City, who celebrate Randall for bringing in notorious killer Jumbo Kane.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is rooked out of his bounty by crafty criminal Hunt Willis and his accomplice.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Against better judgment after losing a quick draw contest and bet, Josh serves as a guide for a dandified East Coast gun salesman who comes west to retrieve and replace a defective gun he sold to notorious outlaw Curly Bill Brocius.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: On the trail of a Cavalry deserter and the horses he stole, Josh rides into a town ruled as the private fiefdom of its autocratic, psychopathic marshal who is holding the horses and deserter.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Hired by a father to bring back the man who killed his son Josh is surprised when he doesn't get paid because he brought the man back alive.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh must bring a man back for murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings a wanted man into the Mesa City Sheriff, only to find he killed the sheriff's brother.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is looking for a man who, while trying to rob a bank, is bitten by a rabid dog.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A man shoots his brother over ownership of their property and blames it on an Indian who reclaimed his horse the man found and stole.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is captured by a corrupt deputy and is forced by the sheriff to work on a chain gang in a gold mine.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Jennifer believes her dress budget is $10,000, while her mother thinks she should spend less since her grandmother is paying; a toy designer wants to look like a princess; a woman's fitting goes into crisis mode over a curved band of fabric.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Fathers accompany their daughters to help find wedding gowns and offer fatherly advice; wedding fund.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: A bride plans to lose 20 pounds before her wedding, so she's searching for a flattering dress; a consultant works with a plus-size bride.

programme.desc: A bride tells Dianne and Randy her budget is $7,000, while her mother reveals it's actually $4,000; a pageant queen's mother wants her to wear a Cinderella dress; a bride's dress comes up seven inches too short during her fitting.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress

programme.desc: A bride already has the perfect dress, but can't stop shopping; a client doesn't disclose she's found a dress at another store; a bride tries on a Pnina Tornai dress that's beyond her budget.

programme.desc: Sarah and Randy vow to turn Virgina's appointment around when they realize the dress of her dreams has been sold; Jennifer rushes because of the upcoming redeployment of her fiancé; Kelly's dress must be taken apart seam by seam.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: John Henson kicks off the competition by revealing all the skeletons in his family's closet to inspire the eight bakers as they make scary skeleton desserts; the main heat is monster madness as the bakers conjure up monster-under-the-bed creations.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: The bakers use fresh flavors and colorful decorations to bring old desserts back to life and impress the judges in the Day of the Dead main heat.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: The six remaining bakers team up to create desserts that pay tribute to the iconic Addams Family; the wonderfully creepy family is honored with dead velvet cakes, and the judges determine who's spooky enough to move on to the next round.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: John Henson's mummy issues inspire the challenge of crepe cakes, and judges decide on the creepiest; in the main heat, the five remaining bakers use classic fall ingredients to create jack-o'-lantern pies that are half scary and half sweet.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: The remaining four bakers go digging to create terrifyingly tasty grave-robber desserts; for the main heat, it's a night at the cemetery as the competitors sculpt marbled tomb cakes to impress the judges.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: Host John Henson instructs the three remaining bakers to construct a Ghostembouche, or ghostly version of a croquembouche tower; then they face the final challenge of creating a bleeding zombie cake for the judges.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: A missing beauty and a fortune in diamonds lead Bret Maverick all the way to Guatemala City, where he becomes the victim of the lovely Angelita, for whom there is a reward posted.

programme.desc: Bret wins a sheep ranch in a poker game. The only problem is that it's surrounded by cattle ranchers in a range war to exterminate all sheep -- and all sheep ranchers.

programme.title: The Young Riders

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Alex wakes up in the morning and finds a gun in her hand and a dead man beside her. Realizing she was framed, the Rangers investigate. Alex's father comes to town to defend her.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Joey Prado, the professional kickboxer whom Walker trained and helped when he was in trouble, has just graduated from the police academy. And he gets an assignment which has him going undercover to get a guy he knew who is now a drug dealer.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A man that Walker and others helped put into prison has escaped. He is determined to kill those responsible for his imprisonment, with Walker being the last one on his list.

programme.title: Maverick

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Beau and Judge Scott discover the relatives of a wealthy young woman are planning to institutionalize her -- and that her lover, a professional killer, is planning to murder her.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bart has a lot of explaining to do: the bank has been robbed … and his saddlebags are bulging with stolen loot.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: When Beau finds himself seeking refuge from the winter in a cave that a group of bandits are using as a hideout, he pretends to be the notorious outlaw Red Dog.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba summons three powerful Blue-Eyes White Dragons, but Yugi has no monsters remaining in his deck! Is losing only a matter of time, or will a long-dormant card from a fallen friend help turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba not only controls Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon, but his Final Attack Orders card leaves Yugi with only three cards in his deck! If Yugi loses, he'll have to give up his chance to save the world from Marik's evil!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Tired of Kaiba's insults, Joey challenges Kaiba for third place in the Battle City Tournament! Has Joey mastered enough strategies to take down the top dog, or is Kaiba going to wallop Joey like a pathetic puppy?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba attacks with his mighty Blue-Eyes White Dragon, but Joey has no monsters to defend with! Joey's luck has run out, so it's time for him to rely on skill!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey and Kaiba's battle reaches its roaring climax! Will Joey take down his biggest headache and actually teach Kaiba a thing or two about being a true duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the critical Battle City showdown with the fate of the world at stake: Yami Yugi vs. Marik! If Yami Yugi loses, Yugi is taking a permanent vacation into the Shadow Realm!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik proves his The Winged Dragon of Ra is the strongest Egyptian God Card by destroying Slifer the Sky Dragon! None of Yugi's cards can withstand its assault, but a gift from Kaiba may turn the duel around…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi can't strike Marik's life points, and with every turn that passes, Marik is one step closer to taking down Yugi with a final strike from The Winged Dragon of Ra...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Yugi at the end of his ropes and the maniacal Marik waging all-out war, can Marik's oldest friend reach Marik in time to help him come to his senses before his insanity overwhelms him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Will the combined force of all of Yugi's monsters be enough to defeat an Egyptian God that terminated two other powerful Egyptian Gods? The fate of the world hangs in the balance with the finale of the Battle City Tournament!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: KaibaCorp Island is set to explode in mere minutes, but the blimp's engines are offline! Can Yugi and friends escape from the island in time, or will they sink to the bottom of the sea?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Téa and Serenity tour around the Town of Domino and reminisce about their friends' battles during Battle City, they learn how much they've grown and far they've come... and how far they have left to go!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian God Cards are stolen! A terrifying new villain emerges! Real monsters begin to appear around the world! Can Yugi and the gang discover how these strange events are connected before the planet is destroyed?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Seal of Orichalcos, not only can Gurimo have ten monsters at once, but each creature receives a power boost from Orichalcos's malevolent energies! Yugi better find a way to protect himself against Gurimo's horde!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Not only is our world on the brink of apocalypse, but an entire domain of monsters is also on the verge of collapse! Both Earth and the monster domain must unite and fight against the largest terror they have ever faced!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the gang set off on a cross-country trek when they're asked for help from a one-eyed former foe.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba returns to Duelist Kingdom for a showdown against Pegasus! Will Kaiba discover the secret behind Pegasus's strategies before he loses his soul, just like he did on his first trip to Duelist Kingdom?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Not only does Alister's fiend gain attack points for every fiery monster on the field, but it can also take control of Kaiba's monsters! Will Alister get his revenge, or will Kaiba get aid from the monster domain?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai's back to help Yugi take down Dartz and save the world from annihilation... or is a topsy-turvy twist in the works?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai has joined the enemy! Is she brainwashed, or is there some deeper reason for her unexpected transformation?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Taking advantage of the Seal of Orichalcos, Mai coordinates her Harpie Ladies to whittle Joey's forces into waste! Is this the last we'll see of him, or will a legendary guardian recognize Joey as a true duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With the potent powers of Claw of Hermos, Joey transforms Time Wizard into an almighty... hammer? Can Joey master the uncanny abilities of his new card to pound Mai's Harpie Ladies before they slash him to shreds?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Professor Hawkins has discovered startling connections between the world's conundrums, the Orichalcos stones and an ancient lost civilization.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a Wild West showdown between Yugi and his fiercest challenge yet: Rafael and his guardian monsters.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi calls on the legendary strength of Timaeus, but when it's not enough to crack Rafael's defense, will Yugi resort to desperate measures and go against everything he believes in to make the riskiest move of his life?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Using the abilities of Seal of Orichalcos, Yugi grinds Rafael's guardians, but he's also succumbing to the card's evil influence. As darkness grows within his heart, the consequences of his non-heroic acts may be his undoing.
